name: HYDRO POWER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
business: The company owns an online music hosting and downloading application targeted at unsigned music acts and small- to medium-sized record labels, enabling them to establish their own music downloading or hosting services. The application is offered with supplemental services such as hosting, streaming, e-commerce and digital rights management. The company has completed development but only commenced commercialization with minimal sales to date.

exposures.sentence: We are the owner of an online music hosting and downloading application targeted at unsigned music acts and small- to medium-sized record labels enabling them to establish their own music downloading or hosting services.
